login.subtitle: Apne clinic portal mein sign in karein

empty.no-data: Is period ke liye koi data nahi

error.generic: Kuch gadbad ho gayi. Dobara try karein.

staff.title: स्टाफ प्रबंधन
staff.invite-limit-reached: आपकी Doctor सीमा ({limit}) पूरी हो गई है। अधिक Doctors जोड़ने के लिए अपग्रेड करें।
staff.remove-confirm: {name} को {clinic} से हटाएं? उनका एक्सेस तुरंत बंद हो जाएगा।
staff.invite-expired: यह आमंत्रण समाप्त हो गया। अपने Clinic Owner से दोबारा भेजने को कहें।

settings.title: सेटिंग
settings.clinic-slug-locked: Booking URL बदलने के लिए सपोर्ट से संपर्क करें।

step1.title: Apna clinic set up karein
step1.subtitle: Apni practice ke baare mein batayein. 2 minute se kam lagenge.
step1.slug-locked: Pehli save ke baad slug nahi badal sakte.
step1.legal-intro: Shuru karne se pehle, please inhe padh kar accept karein. Yeh aapki aur aapke patients ki suraksha karte hain.
step1.legal-tos: Maine padha aur accept karta hoon Terms of Service
step1.legal-privacy: Maine padha aur accept karta hoon Privacy Policy
step1.legal-dpa: Main DPDP Act 2023 ke antargat Data Fiduciary ke roop mein Data Processing Agreement accept karta hoon

step2.title: Pehla doctor add karein
step2.subtitle: Baad mein Settings se aur doctors add kar sakte hain.

step3.title: Working hours set karein
step3.subtitle: Batayein ki aapka clinic kab khula rehta hai.

step4.title: WhatsApp Business connect karein
step4.subtitle: WhatsApp se appointment reminders aur confirmations bhejein.

complete.title: Sab ready hai!
complete.subtitle: Aapka clinic ready hai. Ek sample appointment dekhte hain.

error.slug-invalid: Slug mein sirf lowercase letters, numbers aur hyphens ho sakte hain
error.legal-required: Aage badhne ke liye teeno agreements accept karein
error.generic: Kuch gadbad ho gayi. Dobara try karein.
error.fee-invalid: Fee ek positive number hona chahiye
